purpose: turn a sold sprint into a controlled delivery workflow with proof and renewal path

stages.name: Intake
stages.goal: capture business context, stakeholders, data sources, risks, and success criteria

stages.name: Diagnosis
stages.goal: map current state, bottlenecks, opportunity, risk, and first workflow recommendation

stages.name: Blueprint
stages.goal: turn diagnosis into a clear system scope and workflow design

stages.name: Sprint Delivery
stages.goal: build the first working operating workflow with human review gates

stages.name: Proof Pack
stages.goal: prove what changed and define the next improvement cycle

stages.name: Renewal Path
stages.goal: convert one-off sprint into managed monthly operating partnership

delivery_guardrails: no scope expansion without acceptance criteria
no sensitive data access without documented need
no AI external action without owner approval
proof pack required before renewal pitch
client success metric required before build
